'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 99''' is the ninety-ninth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[January 16]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[Empire Kills!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[Empire Kills!]]"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 10: The soft parade... of slow sliding death!"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 26: The end... for now!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Prisoner of the satellites!"
